name: dealnest
description: This repository now serves a static frontend prototype for an original premium deals-discovery community called DealNest. The site uses mock deal data, original SVG product art, client-side search/filtering, coupon interactions, responsive marketplace UI, motion effects, and multiple placeholder pages for future product flows.

scripts.mobile:android: npm run mobile:prepare && cap sync android && cap open android
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run mobile:prepare && cap sync ios && cap open ios
